Event: The Arcane Adventure
Event Date: 14/05/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: E82
Star Map

Enhancement: 1
Every 6 sec, the fighter removes 2 random allied fighters of 3 random negative effects and restores them 5% / 6% / 7% / 8% / 10% / 12% / 15% health.

Enhancement: 2
11000 Magic armor from the gems
Every 6 sec., the fighter removes 3 random allied fighters of 4 random negative effects, increases their incoming healing by 15% / 16% / 17% / 18% / 20% / 22% / 25% for 3 sec., and restores 15% / 16% / 17% / 18% / 20% / 22% / 25% health to them.

Enhancement: 3
22000 Magic armor from the gems
Every 6 sec. the fighter removes all negative effects from themselves and 3 random allied fighters, and for 4 sec. negative effects cannot be applied to the fighter and selected allied fighters. Also, the targets of the ability increase incoming healing by 25% / 26% / 27% / 28% / 30% / 32% / 35% for 4 sec. and they restore 25% / 26% / 27% / 28% / 30% / 32% / 35% health.
